log_pattern_service.command: cmd /c echo Starting service... && timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && echo Server listening on http://localhost:8080

url_check_service.command: cmd /c echo Web server starting... && timeout /t 2 /nobreak >nul && echo Web server ready

regex_pattern_service.command: cmd /c echo Initializing... && timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && echo Application started successfully on port 9000
